sentences.english: My favorite teacher was my high school English teacher, Mr.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 선생님은 고등학교 영어 선생님 박 선생님이었어요.
독서를 재미있게 해주셨고 항상 비판적으로 생각하도록 격려하셨어요.

sentences.english: He made reading fun and always encouraged us to think critically.
sentences.korean: 독서를 재미있게 해주셨고 항상 비판적으로 생각하도록 격려하셨어요.

sentences.english: I loved my art teacher in middle school.
She never criticized our work and always said 'There's no wrong answer in art.'
sentences.korean: 우리 작품을 비판하지 않으셨고 항상 '미술에 틀린 답은 없다'고 말씀하셨어요.

sentences.english: My math teacher changed my life, actually.
sentences.korean: 수학 선생님이 사실 내 인생을 바꿨어요.

sentences.english: I used to hate math, but he made it easy to understand.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
